title: Security / Trust Boundaries
description: Trust boundaries for the local you-agent-factory service, operator surfaces, and sensitive artifacts.

whatItCovers.title: What It Covers
whatItCovers.body: Draft coverage for you-agent-factory trust boundaries on the local factory service, operator surfaces, and sensitive artifacts.

keyConcepts.title: Key Concepts
keyConcepts.body: Draft key concepts for local service bind, operator versus autonomous-agent ingress, sensitive replay and config handling, and MCP serve scope.

howToUse.title: How To Use
howToUse.body: Draft guidance pointing readers to configuration and operational docs for concrete setup.

limitsAndAssumptions.title: Limits And Assumptions
limitsAndAssumptions.body: Draft limits separating current you-agent-factory behavior from roadmap and unsupported security guarantees.
